In today's industrial landscape, plastic plays a crucial role as it is both versatile and efficient. Here are six reasons why plastic is often the preferred choice:
- Better glide properties
- High wear resistance
- Chemical resistance
- Biocompatibility
- Electrical insulation
- Low weight
Plastic Processing
Contact Us
Plastics are often processed through injection molding.
